summary: Smart Contract Template Library — end-to-end verified. Backend pytest suite (11 tests) and Playwright UI flow both pass. Library renders 17 templates across 6 categories sorted by popularity, search + category chips filter correctly, deterministic render substitutes fields and surfaces missing required ones, AI tailoring works (and falls back gracefully), anchor endpoint enforces identity gate (403 'identity_verification_required') and on success returns content_hash/transaction_id/topic_id/explorer_url, persisted and retrievable via /anchors/my and /anchors/{id}. Generator tab + Template Library CTA both wired correctly. Demo user state reset to identity_verified=false and temp subscription removed.

minor.issue: First AI call observed ~140s and the ingress returned a transient 502; retry succeeded in ~19s. Consider tightening the upstream timeout / streaming so the proxy doesn't 502 on cold-start LLM calls.

issues: React hydration warnings: <span> rendered as child of <select>/<option> (likely from a dev-tool wrapper). Cosmetic only, no functional impact.

action_items: Optional: investigate the React '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' hydration warnings emitted by EnhancedKBAFlow and AIDocumentGenerator selects.
Optional: harden the AI render path against cold-start ingress 502s (timeout/streaming or early-return + async tailoring).
critical_code_review_comments: contract_template_routes.py correctly enforces auth on render + anchor and returns 403 identity_verification_required when current_user.identity_verified is False — matches the notarization gate model.

Anchor flow uses sha256(content) and persists {anchor_id, content_hash, transaction_id, topic_id, explorer_url, anchored_at, user_id} — good. content is stored separately so it isn't leaked in list endpoint.
render_template falls back to base render on AI failure (ai_tailored:false) — verified, no 500s observed.

AIDocumentGenerator is wrapped in GatedRoute (ai_generator => 'pro'). Free-tier demo cannot reach generator-tabs without an active pro subscription; tested by temporarily upserting a subscription, then cleaned up. Worth documenting this gating in test_credentials.md so future agents don't think the tab is broken.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (library, search, category, editor, render, anchor gate, KBA trigger, Template Library CTA, generator tabs all OK)

test_credentials: demo@test.com / Demo123! (Free + UNVERIFIED — restored). Admin: admin@notarychain.com / Admin123!.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily upserted a pro subscription for demo@test.com to validate generator-tabs visibility, then DELETED. demo's identity_verified left FALSE per request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Smart Contract Template flows verified. If retesting: demo@test.com is FREE tier so /ai-generator is gated; to test the generator-tabs UI inside AIDocumentGenerator, either upgrade the user (db.subscriptions upsert plan_id:'pro' active) or use an account already on pro. The Hedera preview seal is local (hcs_submitted:false) — expected. Anchor still returns transaction_id + explorer_url. KBA selfie step uses real camera; full pass must be validated via backend, not Playwright.
rca of the issue: No new defects. Only minor cosmetic React hydration warnings and a transient cold-start 502 on the AI tailor route which self-recovered on retry.
